name: ops-command
title: Data Platform Operations Center
subtitle: flow, dependencies, rankings & risk — an ops command view
description: An operations showcase spanning eight distinct visual forms not used elsewhere in the gallery: pipeline flow (Sankey), a system dependency network, a calendar heatmap of daily reliability, a source-asset sunburst, a bump chart ranking top pipelines over time, a risk-vs-volume quadrant, a job-outcome waffle, and a Pareto of error sources.

dataAccesses.name: OpsKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(uptime_pct),1) AS uptime_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT pipeline_id) AS active_pipelines, SUM(CASE WHEN status='Failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_incidents, ROUND(SUM(bytes_processed)/1099511627776.0,1) AS throughput_tb FROM v_ops_master

dataAccesses.name: PipelineFlow
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT source_system, dest_tier, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM v_pipeline_flow GROUP BY 1, 2

dataAccesses.name: SystemDependencies
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT source_system, consuming_app, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM v_system_deps GROUP BY 1, 2

dataAccesses.name: DailyReliability
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT run_date, ROUND(AVG(success_pct),0) AS success_pct FROM v_daily_runs GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AssetsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT source_system AS asset_source, COUNT(*) AS asset_count FROM v_asset_inventory GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: PipelineRanking
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS period, SUM(CASE WHEN p.name='Ingest' THEN v.duration_min END) AS ingest, SUM(CASE WHEN p.name='Transform' THEN v.duration_min END) AS transform, SUM(CASE WHEN p.name='Publish' THEN v.duration_min END) AS publish, SUM(CASE WHEN p.name='Validate' THEN v.duration_min END) AS validate FROM v_pipeline_runtime v JOIN dim_pipeline p ON v.pipeline_id=p.id JOIN dim_date d ON v.date_key=d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: PipelineRiskVolume
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT pipeline_name, risk_score, volume_score FROM v_pipeline_risk ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 10

dataAccesses.name: JobOutcomeMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT run_status, COUNT(*) AS run_count FROM v_job_runs GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ErrorsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT error_source, COUNT(*) AS error_count FROM v_pipeline_errors GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Throughput (TB)
kpis.info: Data processed in the current period.

panels.title: Pipeline Flow by Source
panels.info: Volume moving from each source system into its destination pipeline tier.

panels.title: System Dependency Network
panels.info: Which source systems feed which consuming apps.

panels.title: Pipeline Risk vs. Volume
panels.info: High-risk, high-volume pipelines sit top-right — prioritize those first.

panels.title: Daily Reliability
panels.info: Day-by-day pipeline success rate over the period.

panels.title: Stage Runtime Ranking
panels.info: Ranking of pipeline stages by monthly runtime — crossing lines show competitive shifts.

panels.title: Assets by Source
panels.info: Cataloged asset count per source system.

panels.title: Job Outcome Mix
panels.info: Every square is 1% of all pipeline runs — success vs. failure at a glance.

panels.title: Errors by Source System
panels.info: The vital-few source systems responsible for most pipeline errors.
